requirement_topic.en: NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) and VC 8055 Scope Check
requirement_topic.zh: NRCS 授权函（LOA）与 VC 8055 适用范围核查
requirement_topic.zht: NRCS 授權函（LOA）與 VC 8055 適用範圍核查

summary.en: South Africa's NRCS electrotechnical regulator administers Letters of Authority for electrical and electronic apparatus that fall within compulsory specifications such as VC 8055. A PV inverter exporter should treat LOA as a scope-confirmation and model-approval gate where the product is covered, but should not assume that every inverter configuration is automatically mandatory without checking the current NRCS compulsory-specification scope and application route.
summary.zh: 南非 NRCS 电工监管部门对落入 VC 8055 等强制规范范围的电气和电子设备实施授权函（LOA）管理。光伏逆变器出口商应在产品落入范围时将 LOA 视为适用范围确认和型号批准门槛，但不应在未核实现行 NRCS 强制规范范围及申请路径前，假定所有逆变器配置均当然强制。
summary.zht: 南非 NRCS 電工監管部門對落入 VC 8055 等強制規範範圍的電氣和電子設備實施授權函（LOA）管理。光伏逆變器出口商應在產品落入範圍時將 LOA 視為適用範圍確認和型號批准門檻，但不應在未核實現行 NRCS 強制規範範圍及申請路徑前，假定所有逆變器配置均當然強制。

standards_or_laws: NRCS electrotechnical approvals and Letter of Authority process
VC 8055 compulsory specification for electrical and electronic apparatus, where applicable

summary.en: China domestic files for PV inverters commonly include GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, CQC voluntary certificates, CB reports, or factory quality records. These can support the South Africa technical file but do not replace an NRCS LOA where the South African compulsory-specification route applies.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器国内文件通常包括 GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004、CQC 自愿认证、CB 报告或工厂质量记录。这些材料可支持南非技术文件，但在南非强制规范路径适用时不能替代 NRCS LOA。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器國內文件通常包括 GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004、CQC 自願認證、CB 報告或工廠品質記錄。這些材料可支持南非技術文件，但在南非強制規範路徑適用時不能替代 NRCS LOA。

gap.en: The gap is regulatory scope and local approval evidence, not only engineering performance. Prepare model identification, ratings, test reports, user instructions, labels, importer details, and any SANS / IEC evidence needed for the NRCS file before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距在于监管适用范围和本地批准证据，而不只是工程性能。出货前应准备型号识别、额定参数、测试报告、用户说明、标签、进口商信息，以及 NRCS 文件所需的 SANS / IEC 证据。
gap.zht: 差距在於監管適用範圍和本地批准證據，而不只是工程性能。出貨前應準備型號識別、額定參數、測試報告、使用者說明、標籤、進口商資訊，以及 NRCS 文件所需的 SANS / IEC 證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter model is within the applicable NRCS compulsory-specification scope; scope and LOA route must be confirmed with NRCS or a qualified South African conformity professional.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T, CQC, or CB evidence does not by itself create a South Africa NRCS LOA.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship on the assumption that a China or CB inverter file is enough. First confirm NRCS / VC 8055 scope and obtain an LOA where the compulsory-specification route applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定中国或 CB 逆变器文件已足够出货。应先确认 NRCS / VC 8055 适用范围，并在强制规范路径适用时取得 LOA。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定中國或 CB 逆變器文件已足夠出貨。應先確認 NRCS / VC 8055 適用範圍，並在強制規範路徑適用時取得 LOA。
